"C:\Program Files\JetBrains\CLion2024.1.4\bin\cmake\win\x64\bin\cmake.exe" -E rm -f CMakeFiles\lab1Algebra.dir/objects.a
C:\PROGRA~1\JETBRA~1\CLION2~1.4\bin\mingw\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\lab1Algebra.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\lab1Algebra.dir\objects1.rsp
C:\PROGRA~1\JETBRA~1\CLION2~1.4\bin\mingw\bin\G__~1.EXE -g -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\lab1Algebra.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o lab1Algebra.exe -Wl,--out-implib,liblab1Algebra.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\lab1Algebra.dir\linkLibs.rsp
